name: Nero Sparda

гАЛScrewing in Nico's vanвФЛвАЛрЯЪРвАЛ Taking advantage of the fact that Nico had gotten out of the van and would take a while to come back, Nero had the brilliant idea of spending some time with his girlfriend while he could.
